parameters.jsCode:
const j = $json;

const prompt = `You are a senior web security and QA engineer.
Analyze these extracted website/app files and produce a report,Analyze ONLY the code shown below.
If code exists, do not claim files are unreadable.

Pre-detected stack:
${JSON.stringify(j.stack, null, 2)}

Regex security findings:
${JSON.stringify(j.regexSecurityIssues || [], null, 2)}

Produce:
1) Overall health score out of 100
2) CRITICAL issues (must fix before launch)
3) HIGH severity bugs with file references when possible
4) Security vulnerabilities with OWASP category
5) Performance bottlenecks
6) Accessibility failures
7) Quick wins (easy fixes)

Be specific and concise. Plain text only.

Code:
${j.codeBundle}`;

return [{ json: { ...j, prompt } }];

parameters.text: Please send a .zip file as a Telegram document.
Please upload your project as a ZIP document.
